inputs.label: Total Items
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity of items to be palletized.

inputs.label: Items per Layer
inputs.businessContext: Number of items that fit in one layer on the pallet.

inputs.label: Layers per Pallet
inputs.businessContext: Maximum number of layers stackable per pallet.

inputs.label: Max Pallet Weight
inputs.businessContext: Maximum load capacity of one pallet.

formulas.itemsPerPalletActual: totalItems / Math.max(Math.ceil(totalItems / (itemsPerLayer * layersPerPallet)), Math.ceil((totalItems * itemWeight) / maxPalletWeight))
formulas.weightUtilization: (totalItems * itemWeight) / (Math.max(Math.ceil(totalItems / (itemsPerLayer * layersPerPallet)), Math.ceil((totalItems * itemWeight) / maxPalletWeight)) * maxPalletWeight) * 100
